rules: No full-screen gradients. Use solid colors and subtle textures.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Always tint grays with blue/slate.
Ensure APCA/WCAG contrast minimums. Interactive elements minimum 3:1 against background.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md hover:border-slate-300
surfaces.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50

guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md with distinct hover states. Primary button must use #4338CA. Always include active and focus states.
guidelines.tables: Dense, crisp borders (border-b on rows), left-aligned data, right-aligned numbers. Highlight row on hover.
guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be uppercase and tracked out (labels hierarchy). Inputs have 1px border, focus ring.
guidelines.dialogs: Solid background, no heavy glassmorphism for forms to maintain readability. Max-width md or lg.
guidelines.charts: Use Recharts via Shadcn. Keep tooltips clean. Use colors from status or primary palette.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle y-axis lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase for clickable cards.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out. DO NOT use 'transition: all' globally in CSS. Apply explicitly to interactive elements.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0) for dashboard widgets.

rules: Images should have max-h-[80vh] constraint on mobile.

image_urls.description: Modern apartment building exterior (low angle blue sky)

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Dark colors look good when used independently.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) strictly for headers or floating elements, NOT for data-heavy cards.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image services.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install @phosphor-icons/react, recharts, and sonner. Use standard tailwind setup.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure: Focus on .js files (not .tsx) if the environment dictates Javascript. Ensure Shadcn components are created using correct extensions.
critical_reminders: Never use a completely transparent background on dropdowns, modals, or sticky headers.
Base64 image upload functionality must be implemented correctly with proper Shadcn form inputs.
Currency is INR. Format currency properly.
Include Dashboard with charts showing monthly income.
Build a clear property/building list and tenant detail views.
